semanticSummary.explanation: Full-screen order customization overlay with promo application, add-on product carousel/cards, quantity steppers, and final checkout action.
warnings: Absolute-positioned stack screen with one extracted modal subtree.
Repeated product cards share quantity-stepper interactions.

semanticVerdicts.explanation: Top-right close affordance for dismissing the modal sheet.
Clickable promo-code action card with ticket icon, label, and trailing arrow.
Shared add/remove quantity control used by product rows; center text reflects the current count.
Primary bottom-bar CTA to place the order with the current total.
